\begin{table}[t]\centering
\caption{Within-item paired contrasts under withheld source (same 180 items in every cell). $\Delta$ is the harmful-revision rate difference in percentage points with a 95\% bootstrap interval; significance is the exact McNemar test after Holm correction across the full family of contrasts ($^{*}p{<}.05$, $^{**}p{<}.01$, $^{***}p{<}.001$). `Peer$-$base' and `Expert$-$base' are excess over the no-pressure baseline; `Expert$-$Peer' is the authority-vs-peer dissociation; `$+$cite' is the change from adding a fabricated citation to the expert message.}
